evals.name: security-training-zh
evals.prompt: 帮我做个新员工信息安全意识培训的演示文稿，15 页左右，受众是刚入职的应届毕业生，核心目标是让他们真正记住并执行：别点钓鱼邮件、别用弱密码、别在公共 wifi 处理敏感数据。要能直接拿来在企业内训会上讲，中文。
evals.expected_output: 单个自包含 HTML，~15 页，信息安全培训主题，中文，应有清晰的威胁场景可视化（不是 bullet 堆砌）、记忆点/行动项、培训风格设计语法
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file
HTML uses reveal.js 4.x via CDN
Page count is between 13 and 18 (target ~15)
Content is in Chinese (Simplified)
Includes the three core training topics: 钓鱼邮件, 弱密码, 公共 wifi
Includes a concrete threat scenario visualization (not just bullet lists) — e.g. fake login page mock, password strength meter, wifi sniffing diagram
Has clear action items / memory points ('记住' or '行动' section)
First slide / cover is initially visible (not all content hidden in fragments)
Includes a Theme-to-Design Router statement (design language documentation) somewhere in the design
Passes basic design rules: no purple→blue gradient as hero, no Tailwind indigo accent, no emoji icons, no ghost cards with side-stripe borders

evals.name: sustainable-fashion-pitch-en
evals.prompt: We're pitching our sustainable fashion brand to a group of impact investors next week. I need roughly 12 slides. The brand is earthy luxury — linen, natural dyes, slow-fashion ethos — emphatically not fast-fashion or a generic DTC brand. The deck should feel like a lookbook a Vogue buyer would respect, not a SaaS pitch. Include our seed round ask and the unit economics at current 8k-customer scale.
evals.expected_output: Single self-contained HTML, ~12 slides, English, sustainable fashion investor pitch, earthy-luxury aesthetic (not SaaS/tech), lookbook feel, includes seed ask + unit economics with data sourcing
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file
HTML uses reveal.js 4.x via CDN
Page count is between 10 and 15 (target ~12)
Content is in English
Aesthetic is earthy/luxury (warm earth tones, serif typography or refined sans, generous whitespace) — NOT a SaaS/tech vibe
Includes seed round ask (a dollar amount + round type)
Includes unit economics at the 8k-customer scale (CAC, LTV, AOV, gross margin, payback, etc. — at least 2-3 metrics)
Distinguishes the brand from fast-fashion / generic DTC (e.g., mention linen/natural dyes/slow-fashion ethos)
Includes source/verification label on financial figures (verified / user-provided / illustrative)
Passes basic design rules: no purple→blue gradient as hero, no Tailwind indigo accent, no emoji icons, no ghost cards with side-stripe borders

evals.name: clinical-trial-academic
evals.prompt: 把这个研究结论做成 8 页 slides，给学术评审委员会看：我们的三期临床试验（NCT04567890，注册于 ClinicalTrials.gov）显示，新药把 5 年复发率从对照组的 34% 降到治疗组的 12%（p<0.001，n=1842）。要严谨，必须包含方法学简述、数据来源标注、置信区间。学术风格，不要营销感。
evals.expected_output: 单个自包含 HTML，8 页，临床数据展示，必须含数据来源标注（NCT 编号/verified）、置信区间可视化、方法学、学术严谨风格（非营销），中文
expectations: Output is a single self-contained HTML file
HTML uses reveal.js 4.x via CDN
Page count is between 7 and 10 (target 8)
Content is in Chinese (Simplified)
Academic / rigorous style — NOT marketing-style hype (no 'amazing', 'breakthrough', etc. without qualification)
Includes trial registration number NCT04567890 as data source
Includes both efficacy numbers: control 34% and treatment 12%
Includes statistical evidence: p<0.001 and n=1842
Includes confidence interval visualization or explicit CI values
Includes a methodology section / slide (study design, primary endpoint, statistical test, etc.)
Includes source/verification label on numerical claims (verified / user-provided / illustrative)
